rules.Dakka: Each unmodified roll of a 6 To Hit causes one additional Auto Hit. 'Ere We Go! - This model may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.Mob Rule: 12" True Aura, friendly units may treat their Ld equal to the number of models in this unit.
rules.Poor Maintenance: In each of your Command Phases, roll a d6 for each unit with this rule in your army. On a 1, the unit must decide if it will Move or Shoot this turn. If elected to Move, it may Advance and Fall Back this turn but cannot Shoot or Charge. If elected to Shoot, it may Shoot in the Shooting Phase, but cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back. High Altitude models MUST always move, and can never opt to Shoot instead of Move because of Poor Maintenance.

rules.Forcefield: This model gains a+ Invulnerability Save.

rules.Stikkbomb Flinga: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs Ranged Attacks.
rules.Targeting Squig: This model may reroll To Hit with ranged weapons.

rules.Posh Lifestyle: Models in your army may not claim Objective Markers in the enemy
rules.Wealthiest Gitz: Models in your army trigger Dakka on a 5+ instead of a 6+ To Hit.
rules.Sneaky Gitz: Models in your army gain Stealth and Outflank. If they already have Stealth
rules.Survivors of Da Big Party: Models in your army must reroll successful Ld tests.

rules.Scavenging Gitz: Each unit in your army gains one Looted Die for each W# of each model
rules.Hyper ADHD Gitz: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes
rules.Speed Freeks: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the
rules.Speed Freek: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the
rules.Pirate Gitz: All Infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured.
rules.Lurking Pirates: Your entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if it is normally not
rules.Lurking Pirate: Your entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if it is normally not
rules.Goff is Da Best: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit in Melee.
rules.Obnoxious Gitz: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of
rules.Feral Gitz: This army may not field any Vehicle models, but all models gain M+2.
rules.Tough Squiggitz: Infantry, Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters inflict a 2 To Wound on Poisoned (#+) weapons rolling To Wound them.
rules.Poisonous Fauna: All Squig keyword models in your army gains Poisoned (3+) on its Generic Deffkilla Wartrike Wartrike
rules.Breakin' 'Eads!: 6" Aura, the first time each phase a friendly Ork unit fails a Ld test, this model inflicts d3 Mortal Wounds to that unit and it automatically passes that test.
rules.Waaagh!: 6" Aura, this model and target unit score one Auto Hit on a unmodified roll of a 6 To Hit in Melee. S+1, W+1, A+1, Gains Da Big Boss, Unique
rules.Breakin' 'Ittle ' Eads!: 6" Aura, the first time each round a friendly Grot unit fails a Ld Test, inflict d3 Mortal Wounds and it automatically passes this Ld test and all other Ld tests for the rest of the Turn.
rules.Repair: Target model in base contact Repairs 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore service for one Weapon Disabled, Crew Shaken, Immobilized, or Weapon Destroyed.
rules.Dok's Toolz: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Saw Bones: 6" Aura, target a non-Vehicle model and roll d6. On a 2+, it Heals 1 Wound. Special Wargear:
rules.Saw Bone: 6" Aura, target a non-Vehicle model and roll d6. On a 2+, it Heals 1 Wound. Special Wargear:
rules.Waaagh! Banner: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain A+1.
rules.Kunin' Infiltrator: This model and its unit gains Infiltrate. If the unit this model is deployed with has Infiltrator, they also gain Scout.
rules.Red Skull Kommandoz: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Cybork Body: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Full Throttle: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with Flying may charge the same turn they Advance.
rules.Goff Drill Boss: 6" Aura, this model and target unit automatically pass Ld tests.
rules.Pack: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gains a 4+ Feel No Pain. For each roll of a 1 on a Feel No Pain, the target unit or model suffers 1 Mortal Wound.
rules.Grot Kommandoz: 6" Aura, this model and target Grot Infantry unit gain T+1 and Mob Rule.
rules.Packed Like Squigs: This model counts as half a model for Transport Capacity.
rules.Packed Like Squig: This model counts as half a model for Transport Capacity.
rules.Unruly Mob: This unit may only have Independent Characters at one for every five models instead of one for every two.
rules.Junka Forcefield: 6" Aura, This model and target unit gain a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
rules.Flame Kart: This model may reroll 1s To Wound with Flame weapons.
rules.Meal Wagon: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed Ld tests.
rules.Enraged Demise: If this model is destroyed, each model onboard suffers a hit equal to this models S#.
rules.Transport 6: Access Sides and rear. 2 Fire Ports each Side.
rules.Pulsa: After resolving the final striking place of this weapon, roll a 1d6. On a 5+, double the Hits inflicted and roll another 1d6. On a 6+ triple the Hits instead!
rules.The Hour is Nigh: When the weapon is fired, place a marker on field at a valid target. In your next Command Phase, the missile strikes! Scatter like normal, following the 15" Blast radius rules.
rules.T Minus 5: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. The weapon cannot be destroyed or Disabled. If the weapon is marked on the field and the carrier is destroyed, the Deathstrike Missile still hits in your Command Phase.
rules.Chained Rokkitz: Once the number of Hits this weapon caused has been determined, roll the Scatter Dice again, using the weapon's strike point as the point of origin. Do not reduce the Scatter Distance with the user's BS value. If you roll a Direct Hit the effect is cancelled. This effect can happen up to a total of 3 times maximum.
rules.Jam!: Any double for the number of shots made by the Rattler Kannon causes the weapon to be removed from the game. The shots rolled are made before the weapon is removed.
rules.Transport 20: Access Sides and Rear. 5 Firing Ports Front, Sides, and Rear.
rules.Transport 12: Access Sides and Rear. 3 Firing Ports Front, Sides, and Rear.
rules.Create Panic: This model displaces non-Titanic models 1" away from underneath it when it finishes moving. If the models cannot be displaced, this model cannot be placed there.
rules.Reactor Meltdown: This model Explodes on a 4+ in a 4d6" Radius with S Destroyer and AP 1+ when it is destroyed.
rules.Towering God Engine: This model may only be Hit in Melee on a natural 5+ or worse, regardless of modifiers or abilities.
rules.Fortification: This model may never be moved once placed on the Table, except when it is destroyed.
rules.Shoutin' Pole: Embarked models with the Waaagh! Aura may cast their Aura up to 24" away.

wargear.'Ard Case: This model loses Open Topped and its Firing Ports.
wargear.Extra Armour: This model may treat Crew Stuns as Weapon Disables instead. Choose as soon as you receive a Crew Stun result.
wargear.Forcefield: This model gains a+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Fuel Mixa Grot: One Use Only. This model Advances 6 instead of rolling d6. Declare before choosing to roll for Advance distance.
wargear.Grot Oiler: One Use Only. This model may reroll the Repair Die (either to restore service or number of wounds restored).
wargear.Stikkbomb Flinga: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs Ranged Attacks.
wargear.Targeting Squig: This model may reroll To Hit with ranged weapons.
wargear.Turbo Charga: You may declare an Advance in the Movement Phase instead of the Shooting Phase when nominating this model to Move. If you roll a 1 this model suffers 1 Mortal Wound and cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back until your next Movement Phase. You do not count as having Advanced this Turn (meaning you can still Advance in the Shooting Phase).

rules.name: Posh Lifestyle
rules.description: Models in your army may not claim Objective Markers in the enemy deployment zone.

rules.name: Wealthiest Gitz
rules.description: Models in your army trigger Dakka on a 5+ instead of a 6+ To Hit.

rules.name: Sneaky Gitz
rules.description: Models in your army gain Stealth and Outflank. If they already have Stealth they gain Shroud.

rules.name: Survivors of Da Big Party
rules.description: Models in your army must reroll successful Ld tests.

rules.name: Grot Warmachines
rules.description: All Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters with the Ork keyword suffer W-2 but gain BS-1 (Improves by 1).

rules.name: Only Grots
rules.description: This army may not include any Ork keyword units that are not Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, or Titanic Monsters.

rules.name: Hurry Up and Loot
rules.description: All models in your army must declare Charges if they can legally do so, and may not do anything such as fire Heavy Weapons or Advance if it would compromise a legal Charge that is in range.

rules.name: Scavenging Gitz
rules.description: Each unit in your army gains one Looted Die for each W# of each model it slays. Looted Dice may be used to reroll any To Hit die in relation to this unit, but you cannot reroll a reroll.

rules.name: Hyper ADHD Gitz
rules.description: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Freeks
rules.description: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Shooting Phase as well as before moving in the Movement Phase.

rules.name: Pirate Gitz
rules.description: All Infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Lurking Pirates
rules.description: Your entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if it is normally not allowed to do so.

rules.name: Goff is Da Best
rules.description: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit in Melee.

rules.name: Obnoxious Gitz
rules.description: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Feral Gitz
rules.description: This army may not field any Vehicle models, but all models gain M+2.

rules.name: Tough Squiggitz
rules.description: Infantry, Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters inflict a 2 To Wound on Poisoned (#+) weapons rolling To Wound them.

rules.name: Poisonous Fauna
rules.description: All Squig keyword models in your army gains Poisoned (3+) on its Melee weapons.

options.description: May take Psychic Mastery Level 2 for +15 points
May take up to one S for each Psychic Mastery Level

'Ead Banger Cast 6+.type: Sniper (*+), target model takes a Toughness test on 2d6. If it fails, it suffers 1 Mortal Wound.

Da Jump Cast 6+.type: Friendly target unit is removed from the table and immediately Deepstrikes. This special Deepstrike does not grant the usual 4+ Cover Save. If targeting a Vehicle the Cast is 8+ instead.

Waaagh! Energy Cast 6+.type: Target unit gains Furious Charge until your next Psychic Phase.

Da Krunch Cast 7+.type: Assault 1, 5" Blast, Krunch - Any roll of double 1s or 6s for Scatter centers the blast on the Caster instead without Scattering. Any roll of a Double 9 for Strength changes Da Krunch to Assault 2 for this casting.

Warpath Cast 6+.type: Target unit gains A+1 until your next Psychic Phase.
